item.title: Not a South Park fan but .....
item.dc:creator: Xalten2

item.title: Love Isn't Just a Feeling, It's a Skill
item.description: I had this pop up in my algorithm and liked what I read. Source: https://www.instagram.com/p/DMW7thkuK7Y/ One point I'd like to make is that mistakes are inevitable, but I'll never excuse a lie. I used to fixate on adultery being the only betrayal (and avoided it as a result), but I've learnt that betrayal comes in multiple forms. (Yes, I grew up.) Anyway, I figured at least one other person may find this useful.
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Imagine going to Wendy's and Wendy gives you your order.
item.description:
Also here she is as Piccolo wearing Goku's clothes when they both went to get their drivers license
Still one of the sickest burns I've ever heard
Also her Yamcha cosplay is pretty good.
The Master Roshi is good too
https://www.instagram.com/kangacosplay
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: I didn't know that this song was recorded by Native Americans.
item.description: “Come and Get Your Love” by the band Redbone. Redbone was a Native American and Mexican-American rock band known for blending rock, funk, and indigenous influences in their music. The song, released in 1973, became a major hit and is recognized for its catchy beat and fusion of styles, including Native American cultural references.
item.dc:creator: iceage2012

item.title: If only Donnie thought the same way

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Poison Ivy - Cosplay
item.description:
My favorite cosplay of the year so far. Am so happy with how I got the lighting and how perfectly my backyard acted to accentuate everything! Hope you all enjoy!
Also had to compare... I've come a long way since my first Poison Ivy Cosplay 10 years ago (Right)

item.title: I really appreciate the reference images.
item.description: Not that I don't enjoy them, I just don't know who they are. Most viral edit - send cosplay, with reference of course.

item.title: I give them all a ten out of ten

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description: Check your local laws to see if guinea pig is legal for consumption before adding it to your recipe.
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: We can't forget to make a little stop
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Good riddance.
item.description: I got into professional wrestling, specifically the WWF (later the WWE) in the mid-1980s. Hulk Hogan was the face of that organization, their reigning world, champion, and one of my earliest heroes. If the story ended there, today’s news would be tragic. Unfortunately, the world would witness the sexist, racist, homophobic, man that he became — or more likely always was — and shattered the public image that I grew up with. The world is a better place that he is gone.
item.dc:creator: license2kilt

item.title: Dramatically change a picture by adding one like of graffiti
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: They bring out everything they can think of to distract people xD
item.dc:creator: Raoul97533

item.title: Laughing for a fundraiser
item.description: I wanted to do some good and put some kindness into the world. My husband's mother is down on her luck, and has had some issues with repairing the house she lives in. It's very old, and in dire need of fixing. As it is, my husband has been the only one to work on things because he doesn't ask to be paid. I've thrown together something to help her so I can surprise her and maybe take some of the weight off her shoulders. https://gofund.me/e3ef67e0
item.dc:creator: Hidatsu

item.title: "He's just like me! He gets me!" - Racists, Rapists, Homophobes, Pedophiles
item.description: Correction: RAPED countless children. You can't fuck a child with consent, that's only rape. I have a 24hr ban again because Imgur is run by fascist AI bots. Woohoo! This went viral! FUCK YOU IMGUR, YOU'RE RUN BY CUNTS! (I can still edit my posts despite my ban. Just can't upload or comment.)
